commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-contract.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts --reporter=dot
commands.evidence: Vitest reported 3 passed files and 96 passed tests.
The immutable packet and artifact-probe files are untracked control artifacts; the default clean worktree role returned failureClass worktree_state_blocked.
Help names harness next --json as the start route.
The read-only fallback emitted a valid action-required decision with synaipseState.invocationEffects.writesFiles false.

findings.summary: Use meta.synaipseContextFailures with schemaVersion synaipse-context-failure-envelope/v1 as the canonical versioned failure representation.
findings.remediation: Admit CC2 separately and add one parsed decision-meta envelope while preserving strict state-v1 contextUnknowns compatibility.

findings.summary: The required clean-worktree next command is blocked by the packet and probe artifacts required before the Worker can start.
findings.remediation: For a future packet, run clean-worktree orientation before creating control artifacts or make the immutable required command explicitly request dirty-with-justification.

claims_boundary: Current source mapping and focused local test proof only. No new runtime, schema/package compatibility, canary, hosted CI, review, acceptance, merge, release, or readiness claim is made. The result is blocked_validation solely because an immutable packet-required command self-blocked after its required control artifacts were created.
